text.title: Help Users Recognise, Diagnose, Recover from Errors Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Help Users Recognise, Diagnose, Recover from Errors.

example.scenario: A solo founder applies help users recognise, diagnose, recover from errors on a live feature: prerequisites collected, draft produced from the template, evidence attached per claim, the validator script passes with exit 0, owner signs off, and the artefact is committed alongside the feature branch.
